case_title: JOSE LUIS PEREZ VS. ATA MICHAEL MANNEH ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, JOSE LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA MICHAEL MANNEH, MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JOSE LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, MARY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, MARY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JOSE LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA MICHAEL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-13-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-23-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF JOSE LUIS PEREZ RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JOSE LUIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JOSE LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA MICHAEL
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, JOSE LUIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSE LUIS PEREZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT ATA MICHAEL MANNEH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARY MANNEH IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED ON DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES THE DEFENDANT MARY MANNEH WHO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL MANNEH WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
